title: Fig. 43 in Phylogeny Of Phyllostomid Bats (Mammalia: Chiroptera): Data From Diverse Morphological Systems, Sex Chromosomes, And Restriction Sites
author: WETTERER, ANDREA L.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 43. Restriction site map of the transcribed portion of the rDNA complex, including all sites from Van Den Bussche's (1991) original study. Restriction sites variable within noctilionoids and Homo are below the line, invariant (those found in all taxa in the study) are above the line (redrawn from Van Den Bussche, 1991: fig. 2).
steps_raw: Fig. 43. Restriction site map of the transcribed portion of the rDNA complex, including all sites from Van Den Bussche's (1991) original study. Restriction sites variable within noctilionoids and Homo are below the line, invariant (those found in all taxa in the study) are above the line (redrawn from Van Den Bussche, 1991: fig. 2).
